ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mu Shun (Á©Üť†Ü). Plotted to save Emperor Xian with Empress Fu and Fu Wan. Executed by Cao Cao. Mu Shun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Mu Shun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
